title: KISS LCI research
description: Research existing KISS implementations for local app interfaces, BLE UART/serial transport, how to carry CoAP/IPv6/control messages in KISS frames, compatibility with standard tools like kisstool, minicom, aprs tools. Reference standards/ham-radio.md, spec/kiss-framing.md, spec/11-lci.md, existing python kiss framing, Zephyr native lib. Identify KISS command extensions or port usage for LICHEN local without breaking standard KISS tools. Produce mapping and schema recommendations. --parent=project-LICHEN-umb4 --type=task --priority=1 --labels=codereview
